title: OBSOLETE - Ashstatertots AIT Server Modpack
description: A modpack for the Adventures in Time official server that adds a lot of client-side visual ehancement mods.
body:
**THIS PACK IS NO LONGER USABLE ON THE AIT SERVER**

# Pack Summary:
This modpack adds a plethera of mods centered around 'Adventures in Time' by Amble Labs. These are mainly client-side mods to enhance the experience on the official AIT Minecraft Server.

## Pack Includes:
- Adds the TARDIS from the sci-fi show Doctor Who
- Adds Visual Enhancement Mods, such as: Visuality, Explosive Enhancemnents, Name Pain, etc.
- All mods are compatible and allowed on the Official Adventures in Time Minecraft Server.

## Server info:
Server IP listed in Amble Labs Discord Server (Linked on Modrinth Page)
